endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.NetApp/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.NetApp Rest API operations
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NetApp/netAppAccounts
